_meta.source: game8.co Pokemon UNITE Battle Items page (archive 336487)
notes: Battle items occupy a 4th slot (1 per loadout). X Attack is the burst-relevant one.
X Attack MULTIPLIES output damage during its window (not a flat stat boost).

x_attack.notes: 1.2x basic-attack damage + ~1.05-1.15x move damage + attack speed for 8s.

x_speed.effect: movement speed up, cannot be slowed

slow_smoke.effect: AoE slow + attack-speed down on enemies
